titleStmt.title: SII 40.201: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 201. (A.R. No. B. 213 of 1932.) Punganūr, Punganur Taluk, Chittoor District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone in the sluice of the tank at the west end of the Venkaṭaramaṇasvāmi street.
This is dated Śaka 1644, Śubhakṛit, Vaiśākha, śu. 12.

Records the construction of a tank and gift of a flower garden to the temple of Jagadīśvara by Muddamma, the daughter of Guṇḍapalle Veṅkaṭapati-Nāyaka and the wife of Immaḍi-Chikkarāya Tammaya Gauṇivāru, son of Vīra-Chikkarāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śā
livāhanaśakavarṣaṁbbulu
1644 Agunaniyaḍi śubha
kṛnnāma saṁvatsara vaiśākha śu 12
lu rājaśrī vīra cikkarāyalavāri
kumārulayina yimmaḍi
cikkarāya tammaya gauni vā
ri patni Ayina guṁḍapalle veṁ
kkaṭapatināyani kumārte mu
ddamma Ammagāru jagadīśvara
pritigānu kaṭṭiṁccina sarussu
yī samīpamaṁdduvuṁḍḍeṭi
pūlatoṭa yī dharmaṁ vṛddhipai
ṁdiṁccedi yī dharmānaku ya
varu Avarōdhana ceśi nā kā
śilō govadha ceśina pāpāna
boduru
Digital edition of SII 40.201 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
